节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability of manage USB device.

Connects to the USB device based on the device information returned by getDevices().
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevice } device - USB device on the device list returned by getDevices(). It cannot be empty.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400001 - Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.

parameters.说明: USB device on the device list returned by getDevices(). It cannot be empty.

error_codes.description: Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.

节点.功能描述:
Checks whether the application has the permission to access the device.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.
@returns { boolean } indicates if the user has the permission to access the device.

parameters.说明: device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: indicates if the user has the permission to access the device.

节点.功能描述:
Requests the permission for a given application to access the USB device. The system application has access to the device by default, and there is no need to call this interface to apply.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } indicates if the device access permissions are granted.

parameters.说明: device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: indicates if the device access permissions are granted.

节点.功能描述:
Remove the permission for a given application to access the USB device. The system application has access to the device by default, and calling this interface will not have any impact.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.
@returns { boolean } indicates if the device access permissions are removed.

parameters.说明: device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: indicates if the device access permissions are removed.

节点.功能描述:
Add device access permission. The system application has access to the device by default, and calling this interface will not have any impact.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } bundleName - refers to application that require access permissions. It cannot be empty.
@param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.
@returns { boolean } value to indicate whether the permission is granted.

parameters.说明: refers to application that require access permissions. It cannot be empty.
device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: value to indicate whether the permission is granted.

节点.功能描述:
Converts the string descriptor of a given USB function list to a numeric mask combination.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } funcs - descriptor of the supported function list. It cannot be empty.
@returns { number } the numeric mask combination of the function list.

parameters.说明: descriptor of the supported function list. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: the numeric mask combination of the function list.

节点.功能描述:
Converts the numeric mask combination of a given USB function list to a string descriptor.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { FunctionType } funcs - numeric mask combination of the function list. The type of funcs must be number. It cannot be empty.
@returns { string } - descriptor of the supported function list.

parameters.说明: numeric mask combination of the function list. The type of funcs must be number. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: - descriptor of the supported function list.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the current USB function list in Device mode.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { FunctionType } funcs - numeric mask combination of the supported function list. It cannot be empty.
@returns { Promise<void> } the promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400002 - Permission denied. The HDC is disabled by the system.

parameters.说明: numeric mask combination of the supported function list. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: the promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Permission denied. The HDC is disabled by the system.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the numeric mask combination for the current USB function list in Device mode.
注释信息: @returns { FunctionType } the numeric mask combination for the current USB function list in FunctionType.
节点.return_description: the numeric mask combination for the current USB function list in FunctionType.
